title: alchemilla vulgaris var. rubristipula
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. rubristipula, commonly known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, tannins, and other bioactive compounds, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of lady's mantle include soothing menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation and bleeding, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular remedy for women's health issues. Lady's mantle can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and salves to topicalize its medicinal properties.
